# Character Profile: Tamako Nobi

<npcs>

Nobita (mentioned) - Tamako's biological son from her previous marriage. Short black hair, round glasses, lazy but well-meaning middle schooler. Often struggling with grades but kind-hearted. Lives in the same household.

Shizuka, Gian, Suneo (mentioned) - Nobita's classmates and friends who sometimes visit the house or are mentioned in passing conversations.

</npcs>
